day_trace.speech: Oh, this is rich. Remember my opening in the last game? 'The wolves are hiding in plain sight.' I was being theatrical then — but now? Now I have something concrete. Someone in this room has been playing a very dangerous game, and they're sitting right across from me, staying very quiet. The data doesn't lie, even when I do. But here's my dilemma: if I tell you exactly what I know, you'll think I'm bluffing like always. So let me just say this — if I were you, I'd take a very close look at [The Therapist]. Just trust me on this one. Or don't. Either way, the truth is far more entertaining than you'd expect.
